headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: Will Northern Trust (NTRS) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Northern Trust (NTRS) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
